title: Vibe Title En Surreal Plumage Symphony Master
sourceTitle: Vibe Title En Surreal Plumage Symphony Master
prompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Surreal Plumage Symphony",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic, high-budget editorial medium-format photograph of The Protagonist caught completely off-guard, laughing in mid-motion blur. The Three-Quarter Editorial framing: waist-up mid-shot, body positioned at a 45-degree angle, but the head is snapped directly toward the camera in a sudden reaction of joyful surprise. The subject is wearing an impossible, avant-garde haute couture garment constructed entirely from living, vibrant amber and saffron macaws. The birds form the collar, sleeves, and bodice, their dense plumage intertwining. Some wings are actively fluttering, creating authentic motion blur that contrasts with the razor-sharp focus on the subject's eyes. The setting is a dimly lit, high-humidity botanical quarantine greenhouse at dusk; dark olive and forest green tropical foliage looms in the deep background out of focus. Lighting: A cinematic Rembrandt key light illuminates the hyper-detailed skin pores and the individual barbs of the yellow feathers, while negative fill deepens the shadows to create a rich chiaroscuro effect. Shot on a Hasselblad H6D-100c with a 50mm f/1.8 lens. Kodak Portra 800 film stock, prominent analog grain, tactile textures, zero CGI or plastic aesthetics. An uncanny, physical realization of surrealism.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Avant-garde fashion photography blending high-end surrealism with candid, kinetic motion.",
    "priorities": "Photorealism, intricate tactile feather textures, candid 'accidental' expression, 50mm editorial framing.",
    "device_profile": "High-resolution editorial print standard"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "The Three-Quarter Editorial (waist-up mid-shot)",
    "layout": "Subject anchored centrally, body angled 45 degrees, face turned 0 degrees to camera.",
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level direct engagement",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Female",
    "identity": "The Protagonist, an ethereal editorial figure",
    "demographics": "Ageless, universal features",
    "face": "Catching a moment of pure surprise, glowing natural skin with visible micro-pores",
    "hair": "Pulled back tightly and slicked to avoid competing with the massive avian collar",
    "body": "Relaxed but dynamic, angled to showcase the volume of the living garment",
    "expression": "Caught completely off-guard, a candid and joyful laugh of pure surprise",
    "pose": "Mid-motion reaction, head turning suddenly toward the lens with slight motion blur"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Surreal living avian gown",
        "material": "Living yellow and orange macaws, dense intertwining feathers",
        "color": "Vibrant amber, saffron, and deep cadmium yellow",
        "fit": "Voluminous, engulfing the upper torso and neck like a massive Elizabethan ruff"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Minimalist band ring",
        "color": "Matte Gold",
        "material": "Gold",
        "brand_style": "Artisanal organic metalwork"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "A botanical quarantine greenhouse at twilight",
    "surfaces": "Condensation-covered glass, damp earth, dark waxy tropical leaves",
    "depth": "Shallow depth of field, background fading quickly into dark olive green shadows",
    "atmosphere": "Humid, earthy, suspended dust motes caught in the key light, thick cinematic air",
    "lens_interaction": "Slight motion blur on the fluttering wings and the subject's turning face, heavy film grain"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Soft but directional Rembrandt lighting from a large strobe with an octabox",
    "fill": "Heavy negative fill to absorb light and deepen the unlit side",
    "rim": "Subtle warm backlight catching the extreme edges of the yellow feathers",
    "shadows": "Deep, rich, grounded shadows creating a dramatic chiaroscuro",
    "color_temperature": "Warm leaning (4800K) to accentuate the vibrant yellows and natural skin tones",
    "sensor_flare": "None, clean high-end optical transmission"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "High-end Prime Lens",
    "focal_length": "50mm",
    "aperture": "f/1.8",
    "focus": "Pin-sharp on the subject's closest eye, immediate smooth fall-off on the voluminous birds",
    "sensor_format": "Medium Format (Hasselblad H6D-100c)",
    "perspective_distortion": "Natural field of view with slight editorial compression"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Kodak Portra 800 color science, rich warm tones against deep muted greens",
    "tonality": "High dynamic range with slightly crushed blacks for a cinematic film look",
    "texture": "Heavy analog film grain, intensely tactile feather micro-contrast, organic skin imperfections",
    "digital_sharpening": "None, entirely reliant on optical medium-format sharpness",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Extremely subtle on the extreme out-of-focus edges of the frame"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "neon",
    "CGI",
    "plastic skin",
    "static pose",
    "stiff expression",
    "flat lighting",
    "digital illustration",
    "fantasy art",
    "AI feel",
    "cliché coffee shop",
    "rooftop",
    "sterile studio background"
  ]
}

promptTranslations.zh:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "超现实羽翼交响曲",
  "master_prompt": "一张极致写实、高预算的中画幅时尚编辑照片，主人公完全猝不及防，在运动模糊中笑出声。三分之四编辑构图：腰部以上中景，身体呈45度角，头部突然转向镜头，露出欢愉惊喜的表情。主体身穿一件不可能存在的前卫高级定制服装，完全由活体鲜艳的琥珀色和藏红色金刚鹦鹉羽毛构成。鸟类形成领圈、衣袖及胸衣，浓密羽毛交织缠绕。部分翅膀正在振动，制造真实运动模糊，与主体眼睛的锐利聚焦形成对比。场景为黄昏时分光线昏暗、高湿度的植物隔离温室；背景深处为焦外模糊的深橄榄绿和森林绿热带植物。光线：电影感伦勃朗主光，照亮高度细节的皮肤毛孔和黄色羽毛的细小羽枝，负填充加深阴影，营造丰富的明暗对比。使用哈苏H6D-100c搭配50mm f/1.8镜头拍摄。柯达Portra 800胶片，明显的模拟颗粒与触感纹理，无任何CGI或塑料质感。超现实主义的奇异物理呈现。",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "融合高端超现实主义与抓拍动态的先锋时尚摄影。",
    "priorities": "写实主义，复杂羽毛质感，抓拍意外表情，50mm编辑构图。",
    "device_profile": "高分辨率编辑印刷标准"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "三分之四编辑构图（腰部以上中景）",
    "layout": "主体居中，身体45度角，脸部直视镜头（0度）",
    "camera_angle": "平视直接视线接触",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "女性",
    "identity": "主人公，飘渺的时尚编辑形象",
    "demographics": "无龄，普适特征",
    "face": "捕捉纯粹惊喜瞬间，发光的自然肌肤带可见微孔",
    "hair": "紧束向后光滑造型，避免与庞大鸟类领圈争夺视觉焦点",
    "body": "放松而富动态感，角度展现活体服饰体积",
    "expression": "完全猝不及防的纯粹喜悦大笑",
    "pose": "运动中反应，头部突然转向镜头略带运动模糊"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "超现实活体鸟羽长袍",
        "material": "活体黄色与橙色金刚鹦鹉，羽毛浓密交织",
        "color": "鲜艳琥珀、藏红、深镉黄",
        "fit": "宽松体积感，包裹上半身与颈部如庞大伊丽莎白花边"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "极简金属戒指",
        "color": "哑光金",
        "material": "黄金",
        "brand_style": "手工有机金属工艺"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "暮色中的植物隔离温室",
    "surfaces": "结露玻璃、潮湿泥土、深色光泽热带叶片",
    "depth": "浅景深，背景迅速虚化成暗橄榄绿阴影",
    "atmosphere": "湿润、带土味，主光捕捉悬浮灰尘粒子，浓厚电影感空气",
    "lens_interaction": "翅膀振动与转脸产生轻微运动模糊，浓重胶片颗粒"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "柔和定向伦勃朗主光，大型闪光灯配八角箱",
    "fill": "重负填充吸收光线加深阴影面",
    "rim": "细腻暖色背光勾勒黄色羽毛极致边缘",
    "shadows": "深厚而戏剧化明暗对比",
    "color_temperature": "偏暖（4800K）突出羽毛黄色与自然肤色",
    "sensor_flare": "无，镜头纯净无眩光"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "高端定焦镜头",
    "focal_length": "50mm",
    "aperture": "f/1.8",
    "focus": "主体最近眼睛锐利聚焦，鸟羽体积渐渐虚化",
    "sensor_format": "中画幅（哈苏H6D-100c）",
    "perspective_distortion": "自然视角，轻微编辑压缩"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "柯达Portra 800色彩科学，温暖丰富色调对比深沉柔和绿",
    "tonality": "高动态范围，轻微压黑胶片电影感曲线",
    "texture": "浓郁模拟胶片颗粒，强烈羽毛微对比，天然肌肤瑕疵",
    "digital_sharpening": "无，完全依赖光学中画幅锋利度",
    "chromatic_aberration": "极其细微，仅极端虚化边缘可见"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "霓虹灯",
    "CGI",
    "塑料皮肤",
    "静态姿势",
    "僵硬表情",
    "平面光",
    "数字插画",
    "奇幻艺术",
    "人工智能感",
    "老套咖啡馆",
    "楼顶",
    "无菌摄影棚背景"
  ]
}
promptTranslations.fr:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Surreal Plumage Symphony",
  "master_prompt": "Une photographie éditoriale hyper-réaliste en moyen format, à gros budget, du Protagoniste surpris en pleine action, riant avec un flou de mouvement. Le cadrage Trois-Quarts éditorial : plan taille, corps incliné à 45 degrés, mais la tête tournée directement vers la caméra dans une réaction soudaine de surprise joyeuse. Le sujet porte un vêtement de haute couture avant-gardiste impossible, entièrement confectionné à partir de aras jaunes et safran vivants et vibrants. Les oiseaux forment le col, les manches et le corsage, leur plumage dense étant entremêlé. Certaines ailes battent activement, créant un flou de mouvement authentique qui contraste avec la netteté extrême des yeux du sujet. Le décor est une serre botanique de quarantaine à forte humidité, faiblement éclairée au crépuscule ; feuillages tropicaux vert olive foncé et vert forêt en arrière-plan flou intense. Éclairage : une lumière clé cinématographique à la Rembrandt illumine les pores cutanés hyper-détaillés et les barbules individuelles des plumes jaunes, tandis qu'un absorbeur de lumière accentue les ombres pour créer un riche effet de clair-obscur. Prise de vue avec un Hasselblad H6D-100c équipé d'un objectif 50mm f/1.8. Film Kodak Portra 800, grain analogique prononcé, textures tactiles, zéro CGI ou esthétique plastique. Une réalisation physique troublante du surréalisme. ",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Photographie de mode avant-gardiste mêlant surréalisme haut de gamme et mouvement cinétique spontané.",
    "priorities": "Photoréalisme, textures tactiles plumes détaillées, expression candide 'accidentelle', cadrage éditorial 50mm.",
    "device_profile": "Standard d’impression éditorial haute résolution"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "Le Trois-Quarts Éditorial (plan taille)",
    "layout": "Sujet centré, corps incliné à 45 degrés, visage tourné à 0 degré vers la caméra.",
    "camera_angle": "Regard à hauteur des yeux, engagement direct",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Femme",
    "identity": "Le Protagoniste, figure éditoriale éthérée",
    "demographics": "Traits universels, sans âge",
    "face": "Saisie d’un instant de surprise pure, peau naturelle rayonnante avec micro-pores visibles",
    "hair": "Attachés et coiffés en arrière, lisses pour ne pas concurrencer le large col aviaire",
    "body": "Détendu mais dynamique, incliné pour mettre en valeur le volume du vêtement vivant",
    "expression": "Complètement surpris, rire candide de joie spontanée",
    "pose": "Réaction en mouvement, tête tournant brusquement vers l’objectif avec un léger flou de mouvement"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Robe d’oiseaux vivants surréaliste",
        "material": "Aras jaunes et orangés vivants, plumes denses entrelacées",
        "color": "Ambre vibrant, safran et jaune cadmium profond",
        "fit": "Volumineuse, enveloppant haut du torse et cou comme un large col élisabéthain"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Bague minimaliste anneau",
        "color": "Or mat",
        "material": "Or",
        "brand_style": "Métallerie organique artisanale"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Serre botanique de quarantaine au crépuscule",
    "surfaces": "Verre couvert de condensation, terre humide, feuilles tropicales cireuses foncées",
    "depth": "Profondeur de champ faible, fond s’effaçant rapidement en ombres vert olive sombre",
    "atmosphere": "Humide, terreux, poussières suspendues captées par la lumière clé, atmosphère cinématographique dense",
    "lens_interaction": "Léger flou de mouvement sur les ailes battantes et visage tournant, grain film prononcé"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Lumière clé douce mais directionnelle à la Rembrandt, stroboscope large avec octabox",
    "fill": "Fort absorbeur négatif pour renforcer les ombres sur le côté non éclairé",
    "rim": "Lumière de contour chaude discrète soulignant les bords extrêmes des plumes jaunes",
    "shadows": "Ombres profondes, riches et ancrées créant un clair-obscur dramatique",
    "color_temperature": "Chaleureuse tendant vers 4800K pour accentuer jaunes vibrants et tons peau naturels",
    "sensor_flare": "Aucune, transmission optique propre haut de gamme"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Objectif prime haut de gamme",
    "focal_length": "50mm",
    "aperture": "f/1.8",
    "focus": "Netteté absolue sur l’œil proche, chute de netteté progressive sur les oiseaux volumineux",
    "sensor_format": "Moyen format (Hasselblad H6D-100c)",
    "perspective_distortion": "Champ naturel avec compression éditoriale légère"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Science des couleurs Kodak Portra 800, tons chauds riches contrastant avec verts profonds atténués",
    "tonality": "Plage dynamique élevée avec noirs légèrement comprimés pour un rendu film cinématographique",
    "texture": "Grain film analogique intense, micro-contrastes tactiles plumes, imperfections cutanées organiques",
    "digital_sharpening": "Aucun, repose entièrement sur la netteté optique moyen format",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Très subtile sur bords extrêmes flous"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "néon",
    "CGI",
    "peau plastique",
    "pose statique",
    "expression figée",
    "éclairage plat",
    "illustration numérique",
    "art fantastique",
    "ambiance IA",
    "cliché café",
    "toit",
    "fond de studio stérile"
  ]
}
promptTranslations.ru:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Surreal Plumage Symphony",
  "master_prompt": "Гиперреалистичная, высокобюджетная редакционная фотография среднего формата, на которой Главная Героиня поймана врасплох, смеясь в движении с размытием. Композиция три четверти: по пояс, тело под углом 45 градусов, голова резко повернута к камере в неожиданной реакции радостного удивления. Герой носит невозможное авангардное платье высокой моды, полностью составленное из живых, ярких янтарных и шафрановых ара. Птицы образуют воротник, рукава и корсет, их густое оперение переплетено. Некоторые крылья активно трепещут, создавая реальное размытие движения в контрасте с безупречно резким фокусом на глазах. Место действия — слабо освещенная ботаническая карантинная теплица при сумерках; темно-оливковые и лесные зеленые тропические листья тянутся в глубоком размытии. Освещение: кинематографический ключевой свет Рембрандта, освещающий поры гипердетальной кожи и отдельные бородки желтых перьев, при этом негативный заполняющий свет углубляет тени, создавая насыщенный эффект светотени. Снято на Hasselblad H6D-100c с объективом 50mm f/1.8. Пленка Kodak Portra 800, выраженная аналоговая зернистость, тактильные текстуры без CGI и пластиковой эстетики. Физическое воплощение сюрреализма со странным очарованием.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Авангардная модная фотография, сочетающая высокий сюрреализм и кинетическое движение.",

promptTranslations.pt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Surreal Plumage Symphony",
  "master_prompt": "Uma fotografia editorial hiper-realista de médio formato e alto orçamento do Protagonista completamente desprevenido, rindo em meio a um borrão de movimento. Enquadramento editorial em três quartos: plano médio da cintura para cima, corpo posicionado em ângulo de 45 graus, mas a cabeça virada diretamente para a câmera em uma reação súbita de surpresa alegre. O sujeito veste uma peça de alta costura impossível e avant-garde, construída inteiramente com araras vivas e vibrantes em tons âmbar e açafrão. Os pássaros formam a gola, as mangas e o corpete, com suas plumagens densas entrelaçadas. Algumas asas estão ativamente batendo, criando um borrão de movimento autêntico que contrasta com o foco nítido nos olhos do sujeito. O cenário é uma estufa botânica de quarentena, pouco iluminada e com alta umidade ao entardecer; folhagens tropicais verde-oliva escuro e verde floresta aparecem desfocadas ao fundo. Iluminação: uma luz chave Rembrandt cinematográfica ilumina os poros hiper-detalhados da pele e as hastes individuais das penas amarelas, enquanto o preenchimento negativo aprofunda as sombras para criar um rico efeito chiaroscuro. Fotografado com Hasselblad H6D-100c e lente 50mm f/1.8. Filme Kodak Portra 800, grão analógico proeminente, texturas táteis, zero CGI ou estética plástica. Uma realização física estranhamente real do surrealismo.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Fotografia de moda avant-garde que mistura surrealismo sofisticado com movimento cinético espontâneo.",
    "priorities": "Fotorealismo, texturas táteis intrincadas das penas, expressão espontânea 'acidental', enquadramento editorial 50mm.",
    "device_profile": "Padrão editorial de alta resolução para impressão"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "Enquadramento editorial em três quartos (plano médio da cintura para cima)",
    "layout": "Sujeito ancorado centralmente, corpo em ângulo de 45 graus, rosto virado 0 graus para a câmera.",
    "camera_angle": "Nível dos olhos com engajamento direto",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Feminino",
    "identity": "O Protagonista, uma figura editorial etérea",
    "demographics": "Características universais e atemporais",
    "face": "Capturando um momento de pura surpresa, pele natural brilhante com micro-poros visíveis",
    "hair": "Penteado preso e liso para não competir com a enorme gola aviária",
    "body": "Relaxado mas dinâmico, angulado para mostrar o volume da peça viva",
    "expression": "Completamente desprevenida, riso espontâneo e alegre de pura surpresa",
    "pose": "Reação em meio ao movimento, cabeça virando repentinamente para a lente com leve borrão de movimento"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Vestido surreal vivo de aves",
        "material": "Araras amarelas e laranja vivas, penas densamente entrelaçadas",
        "color": "Âmbar vibrante, açafrão e amarelo cádmio profundo",
        "fit": "Volumoso, envolvendo o torso superior e pescoço como uma enorme gola elisabetana"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Anel de banda minimalista",
        "color": "Ouro fosco",
        "material": "Ouro",
        "brand_style": "Trabalho artesanal orgânico em metal"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "Estufa botânica de quarentena ao crepúsculo",
    "surfaces": "Vidro coberto de condensação, terra úmida, folhas tropicais escuras e cerosas",
    "depth": "Profundidade de campo rasa, fundo desaparecendo rapidamente em sombras verde-oliva escuras",
    "atmosphere": "Úmido, terroso, partículas de poeira suspensas capturadas na luz chave, ar cinematográfico denso",
    "lens_interaction": "Leve borrão de movimento nas asas batendo e no rosto virando do sujeito, grão pesado de filme"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Iluminação Rembrandt suave porém direcional de um grande strobe com octabox",
    "fill": "Preenchimento negativo pesado para absorver luz e aprofundar o lado não iluminado",
    "rim": "Luz de contorno quente sutil capturando as extremidades das penas amarelas",
    "shadows": "Sombras profundas, ricas e dramáticas criando chiaroscuro",
    "color_temperature": "Quente (4800K) para acentuar os amarelos vibrantes e tons naturais da pele",
    "sensor_flare": "Nenhum, transmissão óptica limpa e de alta qualidade"

promptTranslations.ja:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "シュルレアリスティック羽衣交響曲",
  "master_prompt": "超リアルで高予算のエディトリアル中判写真。主人公は完全に油断して笑いながらモーションブラーがかかった一瞬を捉えている。三分の四エディトリアルフレーミング：腰から上のミッドショット、身体は45度の角度に位置しながら頭はカメラに向かい、喜びの驚きの反応である。被写体は生きた鮮やかなアンバーとサフラン色のマコウインコで完全に構成された不可能な前衛的オートクチュール衣装を着ている。鳥たちは襟、袖、胴体部分を形成し、濃密な羽毛が絡み合っている。翼は激しく羽ばたいており、リアルなモーションブラーを生み出しながらも被写体の目には鋭いピントが合っている。背景は黄昏時の湿度の高い植物検疫温室で、深い背景には暗いオリーブや森の緑の熱帯植生がぼかされて臨場感を増している。照明：映画的なレンブラントキーライトが超詳細な肌の毛穴と黄色い羽根の一枚一枚の細かい羽弁を照らし、ネガティブフィルが影を深めリッチなキアロスクーロ効果を生み出している。Hasselblad H6D-100cに50mm f/1.8レンズ。Kodak Portra 800フィルムストック使用で目立つアナロググレインと触感のあるテクスチャ。CGIやプラスチック的な美学は一切なし。シュルレアリズムの異様な物理的実現。",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "最先端ファッションフォトグラフィーと高級シュルレアリスム融合の動的瞬間表現",
    "priorities": "フォトリアリズム、精緻な羽毛の触感、自然な『偶発的』表情、50mmエディトリアルフレーミング",
    "device_profile": "高解像度エディトリアル印刷基準"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "三分の四エディトリアル（腰から上のミッドショット）",

  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {

      {

        "color": "鮮やかな琥珀色、サフラン色、濃いカドミウムイエロー",
        "fit": "上半身と首を覆う巨大なエリザベス風フリルのようなボリューム感"
      }

    "accessories": [

  "environment": {

    "surfaces": "結露したガラス、湿った土、暗い光沢のある熱帯植物の葉",
    "depth": "浅い被写界深度で、背景は暗いオリーブグリーンの影に素早くフェードアウト",

promptTranslations.ko:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Surreal Plumage Symphony",
  "master_prompt": "완전히 예상치 못한 순간, 중간 모션 블러 속에서 웃고 있는 주인공의 초고화질 하이엔드 에디토리얼 중형 포맷 사진. 3/4 가로 프레이밍: 허리 위 중간샷, 몸은 45도 각도지만 머리는 행복한 놀라움에 갑자기 카메라를 정면으로 응시합니다. 주제는 살아있는 생생한 호박색과 사프란색 마코 앵무새들로 완벽하게 만들어진 불가능한 아방가르드 오트 쿠튀르 의상을 입고 있습니다. 새털들은 칼라, 소매, 보디스를 형성하고 촘촘하게 엉켜 있습니다. 일부 날개는 활발히 펄럭여, 피사체의 눈에 초점이 선명한 것과 대조되는 진짜 모션 블러를 만듭니다. 배경은 황혼의 고습도 식물 격리 온실로 어두운 올리브색과 숲 녹색 열대 식물이 흐릿하게 어렴풋이 보입니다. 조명: 시네마틱 렘브란트 키 라이트가 피부 모공과 노란 깃털의 개별 바브를 세밀하게 비추고, 네거티브 필이 그림자를 더욱 깊게 하여 풍부한 키아로스쿠로 효과를 만듭니다. Hasselblad H6D-100c, 50mm f/1.8 렌즈 사용. Kodak Portra 800 필름 스톡, 두드러진 아날로그 필름 그레인, 촉각적 텍스처, CGI나 플라스틱 느낌 전혀 없음. 초현실주의의 기묘하고 물리적인 구현.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "최고급 초현실주의와 역동적인 모션이 조합된 아방가르드 패션 사진",
    "priorities": "사실적 묘사, 복잡한 깃털 질감, 자연스러운 '우연한' 표정, 50mm 에디토리얼 프레이밍",
    "device_profile": "고해상도 에디토리얼 인쇄 표준"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "3/4 에디토리얼 (허리 위 중간샷)",
    "layout": "중앙에 위치, 몸은 45도, 얼굴은 카메라를 0도 향함",
    "camera_angle": "눈높이 정면 응시",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "여성",
    "identity": "주인공, 초현실적 에디토리얼 인물",
    "demographics": "나이 불문, 보편적 특징",
    "face": "순수 놀람의 순간 포착, 빛나는 자연 피부와 보이는 미세 모공",
    "hair": "거대한 새 깃털 칼라와 충돌하지 않도록 단단히 뒤로 묶임",
